faqs.question: What pests are commonly treated with general pest control in Lynbrook?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service in Lynbrook targets ants, cockroaches, spiders, silverfish, earwigs, beetles, mice, and other common household pests. We customize treatments based on the specific pest pressures affecting your property and the season.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule general pest control services in Lynbrook?
faqs.answer: We recommend quarterly treatments (every 3 months) for optimal protection in Lynbrook. This schedule prevents pest populations from establishing and addresses seasonal variations, with more frequent visits available for active infestations or commercial properties.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for children and pets in Lynbrook homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved, family-safe products and follow strict application protocols. Our technicians can recommend additional precautions if needed, and most treatments allow your family and pets to return within 2-4 hours of application.

faqs.question: What does the $175-$300 price range cover for general pest control in Lynbrook?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on your property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. Standard single-family homes typically range $175-$225 per visit, while larger properties or initial intensive treatments may reach $300. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before any service.
